description: Regression: INFANTRY units must be able to stage a move INTO a tall ruin without paying a phantom vertical climb cost. Before the fix, MovementPhase._get_vertical_climb_cost added the full terrain height (6" for TALL) to the move distance regardless of the unit's keywords, so a 4.1" move onto a tall ruin became 10.1" and was rejected as 'exceeds cap' — the model snapped back silently. After the fix, units that can_move_through the destination terrain (INFANTRY through ruins per 10e ground-floor rule) skip the climb cost. Drives a live STAGE_MODEL_MOVE so any rejection surfaces as expect_action_result success=false. Witchseekers D m4 starts at (1280, 50); ruins_7 is TALL at (1360, 320), bounds x:1120-1600 y:200-440. Destination (1280, 250) lands the model safely inside ruins_7 (kept clear of the north wall at y=200, since a 32mm base requires the center to sit ≥31.5px from the wall — this scenario does NOT cover ending-on-wall, see infantry_enters_ruin_wall.json for the wall-overlap endpoint rule). Distance from start is 200 px = 5.0", within the 6" cap as long as the phantom 6" climb is gone.
